arguments.content:
---
created_at: 2026-03-30T09:00:00+08:00
author: metaclaw_agent
status: done
---

# Sprint 8 Week 2 Goals

## Overview

| Field | Details |
|-------|---------|
| **Sprint** | Sprint 8, Week 2 |
| **Period** | March 30 – April 3, 2026 |
| **Theme** | Documentation Excellence & Sprint Kickoff |
| **Team** | Alex, Jordan, Sam, Taylor, Casey |

---

## Objectives and Key Results (OKRs)

### Objective 1: Complete Documentation Organization
**Goal**: Establish a clean, organized documentation structure for Sprint 8

| Key Result | Target | Owner |
|------------|--------|-------|
| KR 1.1 | Archive all Sprint 7 artifacts and review materials | 100% complete | Alex |
| KR 1.2 | Update project documentation index and README | 100% complete | Alex |
| KR 1.3 | Create ADR for API versioning strategy | Published | Alex |
| KR 1.4 | Set up automated documentation generation pipeline | Pipeline active | Casey |

**Success Criteria**: All documentation is accessible, searchable, and follows established naming conventions.

---

### Objective 2: Complete Sprint 7 Action Items
**Goal**: Close out all pending tasks from Sprint 7 Review

| Key Result | Target | Owner |
|------------|--------|-------|
| KR 2.1 | Admin dashboard UX improvements | 100% complete | Sam |
| KR 2.2 | API v2.3.0 changelog published | Published | Taylor |
| KR 2.3 | Payment integration patterns documented | Published | Jordan |
| KR 2.4 | Security audit scheduled with external firm | Contract signed | Alex |

**Success Criteria**: Zero open action items from Sprint 7 Review by end of week.

---

### Objective 3: Sprint 8 Planning & Alignment
**Goal**: Team is fully aligned on Sprint 8 scope and priorities

| Key Result | Target | Owner |
|------------|--------|-------|
| KR 3.1 | Sprint 8 kickoff meeting completed | 100% attendance | Alex |
| KR 3.2 | All team task boards updated | 100% updated | All |
| KR 3.3 | Sprint 8 scope finalized and communicated | Documented | Alex |
| KR 3.4 | Individual weekly plans submitted | 100% submitted | All |

**Success Criteria**: Every team member has clear priorities and understands Sprint 8 deliverables.

---

### Objective 4: Improve Team Collaboration
**Goal**: Implement retrospective feedback to improve team processes

| Key Result | Target | Owner |
|------------|--------|-------|
| KR 4.1 | Daily async standups in Slack initiated | 5/5 days | All |
| KR 4.2 | Pair programming session completed | 1+ session | Team |
| KR 4.3 | Documentation sprint on Friday | Completed | All |
| KR 4.4 | Stakeholder demo conducted | Positive feedback | Team |

**Success Criteria**: Team reports improved communication and collaboration in weekly retrospective.

---

## Key Milestones

| Date | Milestone | Owner | Success Criteria |
|------|-----------|-------|------------------|
| **Mar 30** | Sprint 8 Kickoff | Alex | All attendees aligned on goals |
| **Mar 31** | Documentation Index Updated | Alex | All docs accessible via index |
| **Apr 1** | Dashboard UX Complete | Sam | UX improvements deployed to staging |
| **Apr 2** | API Documentation Delivered | Taylor, Casey | Changelog published, pipeline active |
| **Apr 3** | Stakeholder Demo | Team | Demo completed with positive feedback |

---

## Success Criteria Summary

### Documentation (40% weight)
- [ ] All Sprint 7 artifacts archived
- [ ] Documentation index updated and accessible
- [ ] API v2.3.0 changelog published
- [ ] Automated doc generation pipeline operational
- [ ] Payment integration patterns documented

### Sprint Completion (30% weight)
- [ ] All Sprint 7 action items closed
- [ ] Admin dashboard UX improvements live
- [ ] Security audit scheduled
- [ ] Zero carryover to Week 3

### Team Alignment (20% weight)
- [ ] 100% task board coverage
- [ ] Clear Sprint 8 scope communicated
- [ ] All team members have weekly plans

### Process Improvement (10% weight)
- [ ] Daily async standups maintained
- [ ] At least one pair programming session
- [ ] Friday documentation sprint completed
- [ ] Stakeholder demo conducted

---

## Risk Assessment

| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|------------|--------|------------|
| Dashboard UX takes longer than expected | Medium | High | Daily check-ins with Sam; scope adjustments if needed |
| Doc pipeline setup blocked by dependencies | Low | Medium | Casey to start with manual process as fallback |
| Security audit vendor unavailable | Low | High | Identify backup vendors by Tuesday |
| Team member unavailable | Low | High | Cross-training and knowledge sharing sessions |

---

## Dependencies

| Dependency | Blocks | Owner |
|------------|--------|-------|
| Dashboard UX complete | Stakeholder demo | Sam |
| API changelog published | Documentation index update | Taylor |
| Security vendor response | Audit scheduling | Alex |
| Doc pipeline setup | Automated generation | Casey |

---

## Resources

- [Sprint 7 Review Notes](./20260327_sprint7_review.md)
- [Week 2 Work Plan](./20260330_week2_work_plan.md)
- [API v2.3.0 Documentation](./20260330_api_v2_3_0_documentation.md)
- [ADR 001: API Versioning](./20260330_adr_001_api_versioning.md)

---

## Weekly Review Checklist

### Monday (Mar 30)
- [ ] Kickoff meeting completed
- [ ] Goals communicated to team
- [ ] Individual plans submitted

### Wednesday (Apr 1) - Mid-Week Check
- [ ] Dashboard UX on track
- [ ] API changelog in progress
- [ ] Documentation organization 50% complete

### Friday (Apr 3) - Week End
- [ ] All milestones reviewed
- [ ] Stakeholder demo completed
- [ ] Retrospective conducted
- [ ] Week 3 planning started

---

*Sprint 8 Week 2 Goals — March 30 to April 3, 2026*
